summary: Comprehensive UI/Playwright testing of SAHP-HUB frontend. All major flows verified: Boot screen with click-to-skip, Login form with badge/firstname/lastname/remember-me, Desktop with 5 icons + taskbar + start-button, Window controls (min/max/close all work), Start menu (7 apps + search + logout), MDT terminal with all 6 tabs (dash/laws/persons/vehicles/incidents/protocols), Laws CRUD + search, Person/Vehicle/Incident add flows, Protocol generator (writes .txt to FS), Notepad open + type + toolbar, Calculator (7+3=10 via UI buttons), File Explorer with window.prompt-based newfolder, Theme switcher (modern <-> retro applied to App className), Right-click context menu + Sticky note creation/close, Logout returns to login screen. Persistence (zustand persist with rememberMe partialize) verified by session reload skipping login. No JS errors in console.

issues: All design elements look polished. Modern dark cyberpunk + Win98 retro theme both render correctly. CRT overlay present. No contrast issues observed.

critical_code_review_comments: useSystemStore.js is ~350 lines, MDT.jsx is ~670 lines — both manageable but MDT.jsx could be split into per-tab sub-components for maintainability.
Context menu items use Czech labels in data-testid (e.g. ctx-Nová poznámka with diacritics+space). Consider using stable English slugs like ctx-new-note for more robust automated testing.

Calculator buttons use raw symbols in testids: calc-+, calc-/, calc-*. These work but slug-style testids (calc-plus, calc-divide) would be more robust for selectors. Spec only requires calc-result + calc-equals which both exist.

WindowFrame title-bar uses Framer Motion drag on the same div that hosts min/max/close buttons. Verified buttons still fire onClick reliably, but consider stopPropagation on control buttons to be safe.
FileExplorer uses window.prompt() / window.confirm() — works but blocks UX; consider an in-app modal for newFolder/newFile/delete.
data-testid coverage on interactive elements is excellent (login, desktop icons, taskbar, start menu, MDT tabs, law/person/vehicle/incident/proto forms, window controls, settings, sticky notes).
test_credentials: Any non-empty badge/firstname/lastname accepts (e.g. 5417 / Jan / Novak).
seed_data_creation: Test runs created TEST law ('Testovací paragraf'), TEST person (Pavel Test), TEST vehicle (1A2-3456), TEST incident (I-7 N), and 1 protocol. All in localStorage only.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All flows from the review_request are verified passing. Note: any new test run starts with empty localStorage in headless context, so persistence-across-reload tests must be done within a single browser session. Right-click context menu items use testids like 'ctx-Nová poznámka' (label-based). Calculator operator buttons use raw symbol testids (calc-+, calc-=, plus an additional calc-equals for the bottom equals button). Window control testids follow pattern win-{min|max|close}-{appId}, window itself is window-{appId}.
rca of the issue: No real bugs found. Three initial failures in the first omnibus run were caused by (a) wrong selector calc-plus instead of calc-+ (b) wrong selector ctx-new-note instead of ctx-Nová poznámka (c) timing/sequencing artifact in a long chained test for win-close. All three were re-verified with correct selectors in isolation and passed.
